$MU will generate ~$364M in profits every single day in 2027.

Every $NVDA GPU is only as fast as the memory bandwidth feeding it and Micron is one of only three companies on earth making the HBM layer that keeps Blackwell-class AI systems fully utilized.

Nvidia remains the AI compute standard when every major alternative combined still ships only about half as many H100-equivalent units: 

• $NVDA ~3M (H100-equivalents)
• $GOOGL ~976K
• $AMD ~226K
• $AMZN 221K

Clearly the Nvidia displacement thesis is moving much slower than the bear case needs while CUDA, supply scale, networking, systems integration & customer adoption are still compounding in Nvidia’s favor.

THE 7 LAYERS OF PHOTONICS

1. Materials & Wafers (substrate layer)
$AXTI, $IQE $WOLF, $COHR, $LWLG

2. Tools (fabrication layer)
$ASML, $AMAT, $LRCX 

3. Lasers (light generation layer)
$LITE, $COHR, $LASR, $SMTC 

4. Foundries (manufacturing layer)
$TSM, $TSEM, $GFS, $UMC, $INTC

5. Test, Inspection & Packaging (reliability layer)
$AEHR, $VIAV, $ONTO, $AMKR, $FN

6. Optics (module layer)
$AAOI, $POET, $GLW

7. Networking (connectivity layer)
$CRDO, $MRVL, $AVGO, $ANET, $CIEN

MY 3 BIGGEST TRADING PORTFOLIO WINNERS THIS YEAR

• Trading Portfolio: +103.5%
• $QQQ +8.1%
• $SPY +4.7%
• $ARKK (0.6%)

1. $AMKR $50 calls expiring Jan 28 (+529% gain)
Amkor is the advanced packaging layer that helps solve the CPU bottleneck through chiplets, heterogeneous integration  high-density interconnects as CPU + GPU architectures become more tightly integrated.

2. $VG $7.50 calls expiring Jan 28 (+368% gain)
Venture Global was the cleanest way for me to capitalize on the Iran war because LNG had shifted into an energy security trade where every LNG-dependent country now understands the value of diversified contracts outside a hot zone.

3. $NVTS $10 calls expiring Jan 28 (+181% gain)
Navitas is the power conversion layer, where GaN becomes increasingly relevant as next-gen 800V data center architectures demand more efficiency, less heat and higher power density.
If you invested $10,000 in $SNDK 1 year ago, today you would have $326,054.

I have been clear from the start: the U.S. Attorney’s Office criminal investigation into Chair Powell was a serious threat to the Fed’s independence, and it needed to end before I could support Kevin Warsh’s confirmation. I welcome the Inspector General's investigation. This is a necessary and appropriate measure, and I have confidence it will be conducted thoroughly and professionally.
 
I take the Department of Justice at its word: the investigation is closed, and any appeal of Judge Boasberg’s ruling will be with respect to legal principles and not for the purpose of reissuing subpoenas. Only a criminal referral from the inspector general would cause a reopening of the investigation.
 
With these assurances, I look forward to supporting Kevin Warsh’s confirmation. He is an outstanding nominee, and it is time for the Federal Reserve to move beyond this distraction and return its full attention to its mission.

No War
No Peace
No Shipping
No Crude, LNG, Fertilizer and Helium

I still believe Nvidia $NVDA will reach $20 trillion by 2030, but that does not mean it is the best AI trade in 2026. 

On Sunday in my free newsletter, I lay out three critical reasons why Nvidia’s return profile does not seem as compelling as many other opportunities in the AI trade this year. Link in bio.
